title: Real Life Time
description: Syncs Minecraft's day/night cycle with your real-world clock. It's night outside? It's night in-game.
body:
![Titel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1f1a06bb669b69168507730337a46c8db8db09a3.png)

---

[![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/17e5d47afb1ec97eaf67b51e3922abe80f00bf06.png)](https://discord.gg/r5u6jwpHJY) [![curseforge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/85767d619d6e19ce7285fa1798c07c196575a0ea_0.webp)](https://www.curseforge.com/members/victorwinner/projects)
[![modrinth](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3c39355dab93d38f00808074166bd07c6a1dad9a.png)](https://modrinth.com/user/VictorWinner)

---

> **Your world. Your clock. Your time.**

Real Life Time is a Fabric mod that **syncs Minecraft's in-game time with your computer's real-world clock** — automatically and in real time. If the sun has set outside your window, it sets in your world too.

---

**📷 Media**

![Mod Configs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/FPbq6YT8/images/93911d4b92f00102142b3cb20bc6153b0b73094c.png)

![Day Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/FPbq6YT8/images/c7ce4823d1fff975ec237572dcd95322845e036e.png)

---

<details>
<summary>⚙️ How does it work?</summary>

🌅 **Real-Time Sync**  
The mod reads your system clock every second and converts it directly into Minecraft ticks. No commands, no setup — it just works.

🕐 **Time Mapping**  
| Real Time | Minecraft |
|-----------|-----------|
| 06:00 | Sunrise |
| 12:00 | Noon |
| 18:00 | Sunset |
| 00:00 | Midnight |

🔄 **Automatic Cycle Control**  
The `doDaylightCycle` gamerule is automatically disabled so the mod has full control over the time. No more day skipping.

⚙️ **Cloth Config Integration**  
All settings are adjustable in-game via a clean config screen — no file editing needed.

</details>

<details>
<summary>🛠️ Configuration</summary>

All options are available via **Mod Menu → Real Life Time → Config** or in `config/reallifetime.json`.

| Option | Default | Description |
|--------|---------|-------------|
| ✅ **Enable Mod** | `true` | Toggle the sync on or off without removing the mod |
| 🌍 **Time Zone Offset** | `0` | Shift the clock ±12 hours — useful for servers in a different time zone |
| 🌅 **Sunrise Hour** | `6` | The real-world hour that maps to Minecraft sunrise (tick 0) |
| ⏱️ **Sync Interval** | `20` | How often the time is synced in ticks (20 = once per second) |
| 🔥 **Sync Nether** | `false` | Apply real-world time to the Nether dimension |
| 🌑 **Sync End** | `false` | Apply real-world time to The End dimension |

</details>

<details>
<summary>🎯 Who is this for?</summary>

This mod is perfect for players who:

- Want a more **immersive survival experience** tied to the real world  
- Play on **servers with friends** across time zones and want a shared day/night cycle  
- Love **roleplay or realism** modpacks where immersion matters  
- Want to add a **unique challenge** — no more sleeping through the night  
- Run **events or streams** where the real time of day adds atmosphere  

Whether you're playing at noon with the sun high in the sky or grinding at midnight under the stars — Real Life Time makes your world feel alive.

</details>

<details>
<summary>💡 Note</summary>

- **Server-side only** — clients do NOT need to install the mod  
- Requires **Fabric API** and **Cloth Config API**  
- Only the **Overworld** is synced by default — Nether and End are optional  
- Syncs every **20 ticks** (once per second) for smooth and efficient performance  
- Compatible with **Minecraft 1.21.1 + Fabric Loader 0.16.10+**  
- Config changes take effect on the **next sync tick** — no restart needed  

</details>
